summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Resolution Templates (Plantillas de Resolución) feature for M1 Mutación Primera. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all components work correctly: Resoluciones tab, M1 template selection, textarea editing, firmante inputs, save functionality, and PDF preview generation.
seed_data_creation: M1 template created/updated in resolucion_plantillas collection during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Resolution Templates feature fully tested. All 4 endpoints working: GET /api/resoluciones/plantillas (list), GET /api/resoluciones/plantillas/M1 (get specific), PUT /api/resoluciones/plantillas/M1 (update), POST /api/resoluciones/generar-preview (generate PDF). Frontend Sandbox page has 3 tabs: Consultas BD, Sandbox, and Resoluciones. Access restricted to administrators and coordinators.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/resoluciones/plantillas: PASS - Returns array of templates with M1 by default
backend_endpoints.GET /api/resoluciones/plantillas/M1: PASS - Returns M1 template with texto, firmante_nombre, firmante_cargo
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/resoluciones/plantillas/M1: PASS - Updates template text and firmante info
backend_endpoints.POST /api/resoluciones/generar-preview?t: PASS - Generates valid PDF with base64 encoding

access_control.admin_access: PASS - Full access to all endpoints
access_control.non_admin_denied: PASS - Should return 403 for non-admin roles

frontend_ui.resoluciones_tab: PASS - Tab visible and clickable, data-testid='tab-resoluciones'
frontend_ui.textarea_editing: PASS - data-testid='textarea-plantilla' editable with template text
frontend_ui.guardar_button: PASS - data-testid='btn-guardar-plantilla' saves changes with toast notification
frontend_ui.preview_button: PASS - data-testid='btn-preview-pdf' generates PDF and shows success message

data_persistence.save_and_reload: PASS - Changes persist after page reload
data_persistence.special_characters: PASS - Handles áéíóú ñ ü © ® ™ € £ ¥ correctly

TestGenerarPreviewPDF.test_generate_preview_m1: PASS - PDF generated with valid format

ui_screenshots: .screenshots/04_resoluciones_form.png - Form with textarea and firmante inputs
